query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as resolvable
FROM gc_payment_events p
JOIN gc_payment_events s ON s.paymentId = p.paymentId AND s.eventType = 'payments_pending_submission' AND s.userId IS NOT NULL
WHERE p.userId IS NULL 
  AND p.eventType IN ('payments_confirmed', 'payments_paid_out');
